name: The Context Company
description: AI agent observability that finds patterns in production and helps teams improve their agents

enabled.label: Tracing Enabled
enabled.help: Enable trace export to The Context Company.

apiKey.label: TCC API Key
apiKey.help: Falls back to TCC_API_KEY environment variable.

endpoint.label: TCC Endpoint URL
endpoint.help: Auto-detected from API key prefix. Override for custom deployments.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Log hook events and transport details to console.

runId.label: Run ID
runId.help: Explicit run ID for the first run. If not set, a random UUID is generated.

sessionId.label: Session ID
sessionId.help: Group multiple runs in the same conversation or session.

metadata.label: Metadata
metadata.help: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to every run.
